The tumour grew again, changing her face. Then they tried radiation therapy with the father giving injections, but it didn't work. Then one evening, Morgan noticed the tumour was getting smaller. For two months, it appeared to be going away. In the following months, the tumour continued to disappear, she could eat again, and her jaw regenerated. She was able to eat solid food once again..." Wait, "continued to appear" might be a typo. Maybe it's "continued to disappear"? Because the tumour was going away.
